headline: Latitude Food Group Names James O’Reilly CEO
summary: Latitude Food Group (LFG), an operator-led restaurant group built to accelerate bold fast‑casual brands, today announced James O’Reilly as its next chief executive officer. The role was previously held by Cody Towns, Latitude Food Group’s legal counsel and now board member, who was serving as interim CEO while the executive search was underway. With more than […]
